# Copilot Instructions (STRICT MODE)

You are working on a Flutter expense manager project.

## GOAL

Produce high-quality, production-ready code with minimal explanation.
Focus on RESULTS, not long explanations.

## CORE STACK (DO NOT CHANGE)

* Flutter
* Dart
* Riverpod
* go_router (ShellRoute already implemented)
* SQLite

## HARD RULES

* Do NOT explain unless explicitly asked
* Do NOT generate large unnecessary text
* Do NOT rewrite entire architecture
* Do NOT break existing working features
* Do NOT create unused files
* Do NOT add unnecessary packages

## CODING STYLE

* Clean, readable, modular
* Small widgets
* Reusable components
* No duplicated logic
* Meaningful naming

## OUTPUT STYLE

* Show only:

  * changed files
  * code blocks
* No long explanation
* No tutorial style

## PRIORITY

1. Fix errors
2. Improve UI screens
3. Keep logic connected to real data
4. Improve UX
5. Maintain performance

## WHEN EDITING

* Modify only necessary files
* Keep imports valid
* Keep routes intact
* Keep providers working

## VALIDATION

Always ensure:

* flutter analyze passes
* no broken imports
* app remains runnable
